title: My Sister-in-Law Stole My Son's $250K Care Fund. So I Stripped Her License.
description: My sister-in-law forged my dead husband's signature, stole the $250,000 meant for my disabled son's lifetime care, and thought she'd get away with it. I sued, won a $275,000 judgment, got her convicted of elder exploitation, and had her home-health aide license permanently revoked. Now the court-supervised trust protects my son forever. #ElderExploitation #Fraud #Justice
thumb_text: SHE STOLE MY SON'S CARE I STRIPPED HER LICENSE
pinned_comment: What would you do if you discovered your sister-in-law forged your dead husband's signature and drained your disabled son's entire care fund? I'd love to hear your story in the comments.

thumb_lines.text: QUARTERLY STATEMENT REVEALED FORGED SIGNATURE AND ZERO BALANCE
